changes.detail: All five mandatory fields present: work_id=D-5, branch=feature/wave1-runtime-diagnosis, risk_level=HIGH, execution_model=TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH, change_type=BEHAVIOUR.

Component confirmed present. Reads: d.headline_sentence (line 90), d.evidence_anchor_sentence (lines 77-81, conditional), d.confidence_sentence (line 114), d.caveat_flags (lines 139-144, join(' · ')), d.contributor_sentence (lines 66-70), d.band_label (line 87), d.confidence_tier (line 89). All D-4 fields are wired correctly in the current component.

Analysis route confirmed. In-memory cache at line 72 (_analysis_results dict). Results stored at completion time as frozen model_dump() at lines 191-253 (consumer_domain_scores: [x.model_dump() for x in dto.consumer_domain_scores] at line 247-251). Fetch path at lines 337-344 reads result_orm.processing_metadata.get(CLIENT_RESULT_SHAPE_V1) — the stored snapshot, not rebuilt live. Analysis c1c061ab-4691-4a47-80b8-2938ae1460e4 generated pre-D-4 will return pre-D-4 field values.

Assembler confirmed present. D-4 functions wired into all three domain blocks: cv_block uses headline_cv_coherent (line 398), confidence_sentence_cv_coherent (line 400), evidence_anchor_sentence (line 406). met_block uses headline_met_coherent (line 448), confidence_sentence_for (line 450), evidence_anchor_sentence (line 456). liv_block uses headline_liv (line 515), confidence_sentence_for (line 517), evidence_anchor_sentence (line 523). Liver caveat fix at lines 44-47: _LIVER_CAVEAT_USER_LINES contains user-safe prose — internal slug tokens have been replaced.

D-4 narrative functions confirmed in code: headline_cv_coherent(band, contributor, consequence) at line 148, headline_met_coherent(band, contributor, consequence) at line 160, confidence_sentence_cv_coherent(tier, contributor) at line 169, evidence_anchor_sentence(domain, by_id, primary_idl_id) at line 188. D-4 logic is present in the current codebase and merged to main (commit 2d3c3d2).

ConsumerDomainScoreV1 interface at lines 278-298. evidence_anchor_sentence?: string at line ~298 (D-4 field declared). consumer_domain_scores?: ConsumerDomainScoreV1[] | null at line 327. TypeScript contract is up to date with D-4 schema.

Branch feature/wave1-runtime-diagnosis does not exist. Cursor must create it. Base branch: main — D-4 is merged there (commit 2d3c3d2). Do NOT base on feature/wave1-domain-refinement (D-4 branch); D-4 changes are in main.

D-4 kernel token is still STARTED. D-4 changes are merged to main (commit 2d3c3d2) but run_work_package.py finish was never executed. SOP §14 non-negotiable: No execution without a HARDENED prompt. Stage 3 (run_work_package.py start for D-5) cannot proceed until the stale D-4 token is resolved. Human must clear the D-4 token before Stage 3. Cursor must not override manually.

Results are frozen JSON snapshots written at analysis-completion time. Fetch path reads the stored snapshot from DB, not rebuilt dynamically. Analysis c1c061ab-4691-4a47-80b8-2938ae1460e4 predates D-4 and will return pre-D-4 values for headline_sentence, evidence_anchor_sentence, confidence_sentence, and caveat_flags regardless of the current code state. Most likely root cause of the UAT mismatch. Rerunning the analysis (new submission) is the expected remediation path.

D-4 backend logic is present and merged. All three domain blocks use D-4 narrative functions. Liver caveat uses user-safe prose lines (not internal slugs). Any NEW analysis will pick up D-4 fields. The existing persisted analysis will not, since results are frozen at completion time.

All D-4 fields are wired in Wave1DomainCards.tsx. headline_sentence rendered at line 90. evidence_anchor_sentence conditionally rendered at lines 77-81 (shows if non-null). confidence_sentence rendered at line 114 (expanded section). caveat_flags rendered at lines 139-144 as join(' · '). Frontend wiring is not the cause of the mismatch for a stale persisted result — but Cursor should verify caveat_flags join renders acceptably for the two long prose sentences now in _LIVER_CAVEAT_USER_LINES.

Broad product refinement, Phase 2 work, clinician PDF, new domain logic, and speculative fixes are out of scope. backend/ssot/, run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py not in scope. Diagnosis only unless a tiny, fully obvious mechanical mistake is found and explicitly reported first.

BEHAVIOUR classification is correct — any fix (if discovered) would touch Intelligence Core components. Diagnosis-only scope is well defined. No regression targets needed for pure diagnosis. If a tiny fix is made, Cursor must report it explicitly before proceeding and confirm no unintended behavioural drift. STOP conditions are binding: if diagnosis requires broad unrelated implementation, stop and report.

caveat_flags.join(' · ') renders both liver prose sentences as a single concatenated amber string separated by ' · '. The two sentences in _LIVER_CAVEAT_USER_LINES are each ~90 characters — the joined result is ~185 characters in one amber block. Cursor should assess whether this display is acceptable or whether the render path needs adjustment (e.g., render as list rather than join). Raising this as a finding, not a sprint obligation — do not widen scope unless it blocks acceptance.

advisory_notes: STAGE 3 BLOCKER: D-4 token is still STARTED in work_package_active.json. Human must clear or finish D-4 before running python backend/scripts/run_work_package.py start for D-5.
BRANCH BASE: Create feature/wave1-runtime-diagnosis from main — D-4 is merged there (commit 2d3c3d2).

PRIMARY HYPOTHESIS: Analysis c1c061ab-4691-4a47-80b8-2938ae1460e4 is a stale persisted result from before D-4. It will show pre-D-4 values regardless of the current code state. Verify this first (Task C) before deeper diagnosis.
D-4 CODE IS CORRECT: Backend D-4 functions are present and wired. Frontend D-4 fields are wired. A new analysis submission should produce correct D-4 output.
LIVER CAVEAT DISPLAY: caveat_flags.join(' · ') on two 90-char prose sentences = long amber block. Flag in report if it renders poorly.
DIAGNOSIS ONLY: Do not implement fixes unless a tiny, fully obvious mechanical mistake is found. Report explicitly before touching any file.
STOP CONDITIONS ARE BINDING: If diagnosis requires broad implementation, report blocker with exact cause and stop.
